usable_items.name: Nanite Patch
usable_items.flavor: Self-replicating gel that knits torn tissue closed in under a minute.

usable_items.name: EMP Grenade
usable_items.flavor: Fries anything running on a chip. Corp hardware hates this trick — street muscle barely notices.

usable_items.name: Overclock Injector
usable_items.flavor: Floods your bloodstream with combat stims and pure adrenaline synth. Your nervous system will send you the bill.

usable_items.name: Scrambler Flare
usable_items.flavor: Pop it and the world goes white-noise for three seconds. Long enough to not be there anymore.
